dataSource: Real Estate.com.au verified market data + comparable sales

buyerProfile.description: Empty nesters seeking low-maintenance living, proximity to schools, and strong capital growth potential.
First-time buyers attracted by Marsden's affordability, school catchments, and rising property values.
Portfolio builders seeking capital growth, strong yields (~3.7%), and consistent demand in a tight market.

strategy.name: Off-Market
strategy.description: Target qualified buyers from our database and investor network. Create early competition without public exposure, positioning for strong early offers.

strategy.name: Soft Launch
strategy.description: VIP viewings for serious pre-qualified buyers. Negotiate strong conditional offer if possible, or build momentum for public campaign.

strategy.name: Full Market
strategy.description: Auction campaign with full marketing push. Competitive pressure from multiple bidders typically yields 12-15% premium and strong sale completion.

items.description: Professional brochures, signage, digital assets, floor plans
Facebook/Google ads, SEO, email outreach, social media

agent.name: Cyril Texier
agent.title: Award-Winning Real Estate Specialist
agent.background: French/English fluent. Engineering & construction PM background. Detail-focused specialist in luxury residential, international transactions.
agent.awards: 11-time Award Winner for Exceptional Client Engagement
agent.approach: Measured, analytical, results-focused. Direct involvement in every stage.

quotes.text: One of the finest sales agents. Outstanding professionalism, dedication, and commitment. Achieved a result well above expectations.
